headline: HSBC Retreats From Higher-Risk Private Credit Bets
summary: HSBC Holdings plc (NYSE: HSBC) told some customers that certain higher-risk private credit loans will not be extended.

headline: Apple, Meta, Alphabet And A Financial Stock On CNBC’s ‘Final Trades’
summary: Rob Sechan of NewEdge Wealth picked Meta Platforms, Stephen Weiss likes Alphabet and Jim Lebenthal chose Apollo Global.
